chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5922 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. hearing of Misc. No. 27625/2023 3. For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar AAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This is old case of 2023, which is over 2 years ago. It was lastly taken up on 08.12.2023. Since last more than 02 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
